headline: Why Broadcom (AVGO) Remains One of Goldman’s Strongest AI Infrastructure Bets
summary: Broadcom Inc. (NASDAQ:AVGO) is one of the best stocks to buy according to Goldman Sachs’ Conviction List. Goldman added Broadcom to its U.S. Conviction List on January 5, alongside Dick’s Sporting Goods, while removing Capital One, Cadence Design Systems, and Houlihan Lokey. Goldman’s list is meant to highlight 20 to 25 differentiated Buy-rated U.S. ideas, […]

headline: Do Capital One’s (COF) Dividends and Discover Integration Reveal a New Capital Allocation Playbook?
summary: Earlier in May, Capital One Financial declared quarterly dividends across its common stock and multiple preferred series, payable on June 1, 2026, to holders of record on May 19, 2026, while shareholders also voted down a proposal to require investor approval of golden parachute arrangements. These dividend affirmations, alongside ongoing Discover integration and plans to expand its physical presence with a new Capital One Café in Charlotte, highlight how the company is pairing shareholder...
